meeting_title: Kodiak Point Fabrication/Kodiak Point Fabrication + Voxel - Deployment Sync

safety_use_cases.label: Outdoor vehicle speeding detection
safety_use_cases.description: Detect and flag vehicles exceeding site speed limits in the yard/lot using external cameras with configurable thresholds.

evidence.quote: We just need measurements to do speed for them.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: You could tell us, hey, it's 15 miles an hour.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: And so if anyone goes over that, we would flag that.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: So they know if their drivers are, you know, ripping through the lot.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Stop sign/required stop compliance
safety_use_cases.description: Monitor whether vehicles stop where required before proceeding at entrances/exits or intersections.

evidence.quote: So they did some stops, right, no stops, where vehicles are supposed to stop before proceeding,
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: PIT–pedestrian proximity and forklift fork hazards
safety_use_cases.description: Identify unsafe interactions between pedestrians and forklifts, including walking over forks and related slip/trip risks.

evidence.quote: person to pit, walking over forks while wrapping

safety_use_cases.label: Dock and high‑collision area safety monitoring
safety_use_cases.description: Prioritize monitoring of dock areas and other high collision potential zones to address common safety risks.

evidence.quote: For you guys, it's been a lot of, especially if we're only going to do 20 in a larger facility, I would say it's going to be mainly your dock areas.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: And, you know, Metro Site is like, you're probably better off looking at your dock and maybe your high collision potential areas.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Finch <fake.shawn.finch@kodiakpointfabrication.com>

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Parking duration monitoring
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Track parking duration/dwell time in areas such as the lot or truck wash to understand how long vehicles remain parked.
